prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Island). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document primarily involves the National Data Guardian and NHS England, which are both England-specific entities operating within the framework of healthcare in England. The discussions and policies mentioned, such as data security standards and the National Data Opt-Out reform, directly impact healthcare data governance in England.
